poolId.description: Stable identifier of the pool or runner group.

poolName.description: Display name of the pool or runner group.

instanceId.description: Stable identifier of the stopping agent or runner instance.

instanceName.description: Display name or hostname for the instance.

stopReason.description: Optional normalized reason the instance entered stopping state.

details.description: Provider-specific metadata for this lifecycle event, such as scale operation identifiers.
